narrative:
Precinct South Bloomfield-West (precinct in Pickaway County) has 648 registered voters, with 63.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 22.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.9%, a clear Republican lean of 8.6 percentage points.
